allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
clean slate: supabase local dev, unified env, consolidated migrations

- Delete scattered SQL files, docs/, media.md, monitoring.md, .gemini-clipboard/
- Consolidate schema into supabase/migrations/20250101000000_initial_schema.sql
- Set up Supabase local dev \(config.toml, seed.sql\)
- Single root .env for all packages \(API, worker, frontend\)
- Root docker-compose.yml for Redis
- Unified dev scripts \(db:start, db:reset, db:push, dev\)
- Remove unused LLM env vars from shared schema
- Add missing dotenv dep to worker
- Link remote Supabase project for db:push workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
